task.summary: [L1-PILOT] Add retention policy header to evidence pack files
task.description: All evidence pack JSON files should start with a comment or metadata field stating the retention period (90 days) and creation date. Create a template for this.

l1_result.llm_content:
{
  "remediation_type": "doc_update",
  "file_to_edit": "docs/05-OPERATIONS/evidence/evidence-pack-template.json",
  "change_type": "modify",
  "edit_description": "Update the template to include a 'retention_period' field (default 90 days) and a 'created_at' timestamp in the root object to ensure all evidence pack JSON files adhere to the required metadata format.",
  "new_content": "{\n  \"retention_period\": 90,\n  \"created_at\": \"2024-01-01T00:00:00Z\",\n  \"metadata\": {\n    \"project_id\": \"ZB-833\",\n    \"template_version\": \"1.0\"\n  }\n}",
  "explanation": "The template must start with a comment or metadata field stating the retention period (90 days) and creation date to meet the validation requirement for all evidence pack JSON files.",
  "final_status": "success",
  "validation_command": "test -f docs/05-OPERATIONS/evidence/evidence-pack-template.json"
}
